name: Superhero RPG
description:
As of 4 days ago, the first alien life was discovered. A message was received via satellite from a civilization outside the Milky Way, throwing the entire world into an existential crisis as those awards grappled with the implications. Hours after, the Greek gods were actually spotted atop mount Olympus, minutes later Northern Europe had dozens of reports of Thor flying by during thunderstorms. Gods seemed to be appearing all over the earth, though many seemed to shun any interaction with the human race at all. Finally, 4 hours after the discover of aliens, the first super powered individual was spotted. A small child, zooming through the air, between the skyscrapers of New York. Since then, thousands in the world have reported or have reportedly been seen using super powers. Now, the world struggles to cope with all these new editions. Major religions declare that the gods seen are devils and false gods, governments demand super powered individuals report themselves directly to the government and scientists vie for the opportunity to communicate with the new alien civilization that has started contact.

It’s a superhero RPG that I made for personal use after seeing the sorry state of the other superhero RPG bots. Mine isn’t much better but I’m consistently trying to improve it (because I’m using it).

Story may contain angst, fluff, abuse, monsters, monster girls, superhero’s, villains, and many other searchable words

The world is based on a world where gods, spirits, aliens, ghost and etc have all become real. Realistically you can push this story wherever you want to go. If you want for Goku to be real and for JJK to be real, you can just add it in the memory that these things were also made real (though I recommend not skipping on the details in the chat memory for this) and the bot should handle them pretty well.

If you want a deeper story then I’ve found the best way is to get yourself in a scenario where the bot is describing the events currently happening and their consequences/causes and just edit it to your liking. Use your chat summary too, so the bot doesn’t forget stuff. You will have to occasionally lead the story yourself. I’ve noticed this issue with every single bot on this site that I’ve used, from time to time you will need to guide the story because the bot just won’t. I’ve found the best practice is to edit the bots response to push the story as when you do it enough, it does start to do so more often on its own

The more in depth the plot/the longer you chat, the more likely the bot is to forget or flat out hallucinate. That isn’t something I can fix, that’s just the current state of the AI. From time to time you’ll need to whip it back into shape by editing its responses, directly prompting it for a specific kind of response - I do so (by typing in parenthesis like this) at the end of my responses and rating replies.

Edits: I’ve removed the part of the first message asking about your looks. You should instead make sure this is in your personality description or add it to the chat memory as the AI is much better at remembering this way.

It will greatly enhance your experience to add your powers, costume description, specific hero’s or villains you’ve met or want to meet into the chat memory. I’ve also found that you don’t need to explain your powers exactly in the chat memory if they’re the same as a well known super hero/villian. Though it it is good practice to include anything you want to be specific about like exactly how strong you are or how fast you can run.

If you post your issue in the reviews, I’ll respond directly and address it here if necessary

WARNING: as of today (7/30) LLMs AI has been bugging super hard. Incredibly slow responses and a high tendency to repeat itself and make overly long responses. This is not an issue with how i made the bot.

If there are issues with the bot, please explain what they are so i can correct them

Please share your chats - especially that guy who h
creator: yeetYeet
